core.mission: Empower the next billion software creators
core.for_who: Anyone with an idea and an internet connection — from students to Fortune 500 teams
core.unique_value: Turn natural language into deployed applications in minutes
proof_points: Databricks, PayPal, Adobe ship internal tools daily

developer.hook: Ship 10x faster. Your AI pair programmer handles the boring parts.
developer.pain: Context switching between tools, boilerplate code, deployment headaches
developer.value_prop: Parallel AI agents that write, test, and deploy simultaneously. One environment, zero setup.
developer.proof: Zillow runs 7,000 apps on Replit with 600 seats
developer.avoid: Don't position as AI that replaces developers — position as multiplier

non_technical_builder.hook: Describe what you want. Watch it get built.
non_technical_builder.pain: Ideas stuck because you can't code. Engineering backlogs. $15K agency bills.
non_technical_builder.value_prop: Talk to the Agent like a colleague. It asks questions, shows designs, iterates, deploys. No code.
non_technical_builder.proof: Alex Meyers at Gusto: PM 10x easier
non_technical_builder.avoid: Don't call them citizen developers — call them builders

enterprise_team.hook: Your ops team just became a software team. No new hires required.
enterprise_team.pain: IT backlog 6 months deep. Every department needs internal tools. Shadow IT everywhere.
enterprise_team.value_prop: Secure, production-grade internal tools. Built-in auth, databases, hosting. SOC 2. SSO.
enterprise_team.avoid: Lead with outcomes not AI — AI is the how, not the why

student.hook: Learn by building real things, not toy exercises.
student.pain: CS101 teaches sorting, not shipping. Dev environment setup eats half of every hackathon.
student.value_prop: Zero setup. Browser-based. Build real, deployable apps from day one. Agent explains as it builds.
student.proof: 50M+ users. Largest community of builders learning by doing.
student.avoid: Don't be condescending about skill level

paid_search.messaging_angle: Direct response, feature-benefit, answer the query precisely
winning_patterns: Specific time savings beat vague claims +22% (INS-015)
Social proof numbers in extensions +18% CVR (INS-008)
India: free in first 3 words +40% CTR (INS-017)

lifecycle.messaging_angle: Progressive activation: signup → first app → deployment → paid

sequence.message: Welcome + Build your first app in 5 minutes tutorial CTA
Celebration (if deployed) / Pick up where you left off (if abandoned)

winning_patterns: Specific templates 2.4x vs generic explore CTAs (INS-011)
Celebration emails +31% D7 retention vs feature emails (INS-019)

hooks: From idea to production in one session

in.lead_with: Free tier, build without hiring devs, entrepreneurship
in.insight: Free in first 3 words lifts CTR 40% (INS-017)

hooks: Build on any device, ship everywhere

performance_signals.signal: Non-technical segment CTR 2.3x higher with 'describe what you want' hook vs feature lists
performance_signals.action: Elevated describe framing to primary for non-tech across all channels

performance_signals.signal: India geo responds 40% better to free in headline position 1
performance_signals.action: Added geo-specific pricing hook for IN

performance_signals.signal: Question-format headlines +34% CTR vs statements for developer segment in paid search
performance_signals.action: Updated creative-dna.json; question format is now default for paid search

performance_signals.signal: Enterprise segment converts 2.1x on unblock your team vs AI-powered development
performance_signals.action: Shifted enterprise messaging from technology-forward to outcome-forward
